summary: This is a brief announcement post directing readers to Cathy O'Neil's Bloomberg View column about algorithmic hiring at Fox News. The post itself contains no substantive analysis, serving purely as a link to external content. The actual argument and insights would be found in the linked Bloomberg article, not in this blog post.
key_points: Post serves as a redirect to Bloomberg View column
No substantive content or argument presented in the blog post itself
Links to full archive of author's Bloomberg columns
key_insight: This post is merely an announcement linking to external content and contains no analyzable argument or insight.
